The '''shamunaar''' was a giant, long-necked saurian creature from [[Roon/Legends|Roon]]. It lived in the mud fields of Roon, and was a constant threat to the wild [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].<ref name="TEGtPaM" />

The shamunaar usually hibernated for decades at a [[Time/Legends|time]], however it could be woken up if disturbed.

It was not believed that the shamunaar was native to Roon, but was rather an exotic transplant.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The spelling "shamunaar" is used in ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'', ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' and the [[Databank (original)|Databank]]. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', however, spells the creature's name "chamonaar", although it uses the "shamunaar" spelling for the [[Shamunaar (frigate)|frigate of the same name]]. This article assumes the majority spelling is correct.
